ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock (e.g., sh.688310) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., Shanghai Stock Exchange) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange (e.g., UTC+8) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the exchange (e.g., CNY, USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading account (e.g., cash, margin) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "margin_ratio" TEXT /* Margin ratio of the account */,
  "leverage" TEXT /* Leverage of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "preclose" TEXT /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount traded on the given date */,
  "turn" TEXT /* Turnover rate of the stock on the given date */,
  "tradestatus" INTEGER /* Trading status of the stock on the given date */,
  "pctChg" TEXT /* Percentage change in stock price on the given date */,
  "peTTM" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "pbMRQ" TEXT /* Price-to-book ratio of the stock */,
  "psTTM" TEXT /* Price-to-sales ratio of the stock */,
  "pcfNcfTTM" TEXT /* Price-to-cash flow ratio of the stock */,
  "isST" INTEGER /* Whether the stock is an ST (special treatment) stock */,
  "adj_factor" TEXT /* Adjustment factor for the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account that executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the stock at the time of the trade */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax charged for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trade record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the stock at the time of the trade */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax charged for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical balance record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the balance was recorded */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Balance of the account on the given date */,
  "available_balance" TEXT /* Available balance of the account on the given date */,
  "hold_balance" TEXT /* Hold balance of the account on the given date */,
  "withdrawable_balance" TEXT /* Withdrawable balance of the account on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market data was recorded */,
  "index_value" TEXT /* Value of a specific market index (e.g., Shanghai Composite Index) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the stocks on the given date */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the stocks on the given date */,
  "trading_value" TEXT /* Total trading value of the stocks on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend" TEXT /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "ratio" TEXT /* Stock split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
